title: citrus elliptica
intro: Citrus elliptica, also known as the Finger Lime, is a tropical plant native to Australia, characterized by its cylindrical, finger-shaped fruit and aromatic leaves. The medicinal properties of Citrus elliptica include its high content of citric acid, flavonoids, and limonoids, which have been traditionally used to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The health benefits of consuming Citrus elliptica include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. Citrus elliptica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which are often used in traditional medicine and as a flavorful ingredient in culinary dishes.
